# IGStoryPeek

> Social media analytics and content tools. Analyze public profiles, track engagement trends, and discover insights across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Snapchat.

IGStoryPeek is a free web-based platform that lets users view, analyze, and download publicly available content from major social media platforms — without needing to log in or create an account on those platforms.

## Main Features

### Instagram Tools
- Profile Explorer: Search any public Instagram profile instantly
- Follower Analyzer: Track growth, detect fake followers, audience demographics
- Activity Analyzer: Posting patterns, engagement timing, content format analysis
- Stories Viewer & Downloader: View and save Instagram stories anonymously in HD
- Highlights Viewer & Downloader: Browse and save highlight reels
- Posts Viewer & Downloader: View feed posts privately, save photos & carousels
- Video & Reels Downloader: Save Instagram videos and reels in MP4
- Comment Viewer: Read post comments without logging in
- Likes Viewer: See who liked any public post
- Hashtag Generator: AI-powered hashtag suggestions for maximum reach
- Relationship Insights: Analyze follower connections and interactions

### TikTok Tools
- User Search: Find any TikTok creator profile
- Follower Analyzer: Audience growth and demographics tracking
- Activity Analyzer: Posting frequency and performance insights
- Video Downloader: Save TikTok videos in original quality
- Stories Downloader: Save TikTok stories
- Audio Downloader: Extract sounds as MP3
- Slideshow Downloader: Save photo carousels
- Video & Stories Viewer: Watch content without the app
- Trending Sounds Finder: Discover viral audio clips
- Engagement Tracker: Track likes, views, and comments over time

### Facebook Tools
- User & Page Search: Locate any profile or public page
- Page Analyzer: Audit engagement, growth, and content strategy
- Group Analyzer: Evaluate community health and member activity
- Ad Library Explorer: Browse active ads and creative strategies
- Stories, Reels & Video Downloader: Save content offline in HD
- Photo Album Downloader: Save entire albums in full resolution
- Post, Stories & Reels Viewer: Browse content without logging in
- Reactions Viewer: Breakdown of likes, loves, laughs, and more
- Page Activity Tracker: Track posting and engagement shifts

### Snapchat Tools
- User Search: Locate any Snapchatter by username
- Score Tracker: Track Snap Score changes over time
- Activity Analyzer: Understand snapping habits and patterns
- Best Friends Analyzer: Discover top contacts and emoji rankings
- Streak Tracker: Track and protect Snap streaks
- Stories & Spotlight Downloader: Save stories and spotlight videos
- Memories Downloader: Export saved snaps and memories
- Stories & Spotlight Viewer: Browse content in your browser
- Map Viewer: Explore Snap Map locations and hotspots
- Public Profile Viewer: Browse creator profiles online

## Pricing
- Free plan available with basic features
- Pro plans from $9.99/month with advanced analytics and unlimited downloads
- Full pricing at https://www.igstorypeek.com/pricing
